rollback_steps: Move any future moved files back to their original validation/, meta/, governance/, or performance/ paths.
Reverse import rewrites in active consumers.
Reverse path/reference rewrites in docs/config/tooling files.
Remove temporary shims only if the rollback restores original implementation files to the old import paths.
Restore active layout exceptions if a future apply narrowed or retired them.
Rerun AIDE checks, strict validators, affected import smoke checks, focused RepoX, and git diff checks.
pre_apply_abandonment: Because this task is plan-only and apply_allowed=false, abandoning the plan requires no file moves or reference rollback.
